# MuleSoft Microsoft SharePoint Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (3.8) of Microsoft SharePoint Connector documentation.
> See [Microsoft SharePoint Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/sharepoint-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Microsoft SharePoint Connector documentation in one file.
